qa_pairs.question: What is the default home directory quota for a user on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the TamIA cluster, the default home directory quota for a user is 25 GB.

qa_pairs.question: Are files stored in the home directory on the TamIA cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, files stored in the home directory on the TamIA cluster are not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: Is the home directory accessible on login nodes and compute nodes on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the home directory on the TamIA cluster is accessible on both login nodes and compute nodes.

qa_pairs.question: What is the expiration time for files in the scratch space on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Files in the scratch space on the TamIA cluster have an expiration time of 2 months.

qa_pairs.question: Are files in the scratch space on the TamIA cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, files in the scratch space on the TamIA cluster are not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: What is the scratch space quota for CIFAR AI Chairs on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: CIFAR AI Chairs on the TamIA cluster have a scratch space quota of 2 TB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the scratch space quota for AI Institute Faculty Affiliates on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: AI Institute Faculty Affiliates on the TamIA cluster have a scratch space quota of 1 TB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the scratch space quota for faculty members within an AI program on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members within an AI program on the TamIA cluster have a scratch space quota of 500 GB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the scratch space quota for faculty members applying AI to other domains on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members applying AI to other domains on the TamIA cluster have a scratch space quota of 500 GB per user.

qa_pairs.question: Is the scratch space on the TamIA cluster available on login and compute nodes?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the scratch space on the TamIA cluster is available on both login nodes and compute nodes.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more information about the expiration time for scratch space on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: More information regarding the expiration time for scratch space on the TamIA cluster can be found in the [[Scratch purging policy]].
